ddt:Target.Name: C1AHS_CSCM_DDT_3_0_0
ddt:Target.Description: Version 3.0.0 This database is compatible with CSCM SW3.0 PDE: Soufiane ALIDE

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
signal has too few transitions / events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Request.Name: DataRead.ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Request.Comment: The coding shall be 'Part No.' in [DTS].

Request.Name: DataRead.DATA_MONITOR
Request.Comment: APC Hard wire staus shall be read, Charging_Reception_Status, DCcharge_CANcomActivation, Reserved, DCcharge_CANconnectStatus,Reserved

Test.Description: CAN communication failure with frame to be received from BCM
CAN communication failure with frame to be received from USM
CAN communication failure with the ECU sending <Distance_ Totalizer_frame>
CAN communication failure with frame to be received from METER
CAN communication failure with frame to be received from HEVC/VCM
CAN communication failure with frame to be received from BMS_HV
